# Competitor alternative intercept

## When to use

Use when buyers compare or complain about competitors.

## Why it works

Category belief already exists.

## Mechanism

You borrow existing demand and differentiate.

## Required inputs

Alternative page, comparison matrix, migration proof.

## When not to use

If your difference is weak or unverifiable.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Impression share, CTR, comparison-page engagement, trials.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
